---
title: "The Spatiality of Learning Opportunities"
author: Kelly L. Boles
date: today
search: false
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: [simple, styles.scss]
    mainfont: Rubik
    number-sections: true
    slide-number: true
    cap-location: bottom
    tbl-cap-location: bottom
    chalkboard: 
      boardmarker-width: 5
      buttons: false
    preview-links: auto
    footer: <https://klboles.github.io/job-talk-1>
include-in-header: 
  text: |
    \newfontfamily\sectionfont[Color=C61A72]{Big Shoulders Text}
    \newfontfamily\subsectionfont[Color=131521]{Rubik}
    \newfontfamily\subsubsectionfont[Color=262626]{Rubik}
    \addtokomafont{section}{\sectionfont}
    \addtokomafont{subsection}{\subsectionfont}
    \addtokomfont{subsubsection}{\subsubsectionfont}
execute: 
  echo: false
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```
